name: siyuan-hugo-publisher
description: SiYuan plugin to publish notes to Hugo with metadata mapping, image handling, auto-sync on save, and orphan-aware cleanup.

scripts.test: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-build',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir .test-build --rootDir . --module Node16 --moduleResolution node16 --declaration false --declarationMap false --sourceMap false && node --test tests/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
